prompt: The connection leaks when an exception occurs. What is the bug?
choices: Connection objects close automatically when they go out of scope
If executeQuery() throws, rs.close()/st.close()/conn.close() are skipped and database connections leak
DriverManager.getConnection must be wrapped in synchronized
ResultSet must be closed before Statement
explanation: An exception from executeQuery jumps out of the method, bypassing all three close() calls. Each unclosed Connection consumes a database connection from the pool. Fix: use try-with-resources — Connection, Statement, and ResultSet all implement AutoCloseable. They close in reverse order automatically.
